name: Pastry Tart Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour and salt.
2. Add the shortening and rub it into the flour mixture with your hands until well blended.
3. Gradually add the grapefruit soda, 1 tablespoon at a time, and toss with a fork until the dough holds together.
4. Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before rolling out to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
5. Press the dough onto the bottom and up the sides of a tart pan.
6. Line the tart pan with foil and weight it down with beans, rice, or other pie weights.
7. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 10 minutes, then remove the foil.
8. Continue baking until the crust is golden brown.
9. Fill as desired.
